channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9902] PANIC at range_tree.c:153:range_tree_destroy()
item.description:
<div class="preformatted panel" style="border-width: 1px;"><div class="preformattedContent panelContent"> <pre>[22995.538261] Lustre: MGS: Connection restored to 8e47cd51-bdeb-bdc3-b6ec-d22daa8cfe5f (at 0@lo) [23000.700301] Lustre: ctl-testfs-MDT0000: No data found on store. Initialize space [23000.725840] Lustre: testfs-MDT0000: new disk, initializing [23000.967623] Lustre: testfs-MDT0000: Imperative Recovery not enabled, recovery window 300-900 [23000.971064] LustreError: 31913:0:(osd_oi.c:503:osd_oid()) testfs-MDT0000-osd: unsupported quota oid: 0x16 [23001.010713] Lustre: ctl-testfs-MDT0000: super-sequence allocation rc = 0 [0x0000000200000400-0x0000000240000400]:0:mdt [23001.254639] Lustre: Failing over testfs-MDT0000 [23001.328691] Lustre: server umount testfs-MDT0000 complete [23029.882138] Lustre: testfs-MDT0000: Imperative Recovery not enabled, recovery window 300-900 [23029.890149] LustreError: 2524:0:(osd_oi.c:503:osd_oid()) testfs-MDT0000-osd: unsupported quota oid: 0x16 [23034.671859] Lustre: MGS: Connection restored to f4d06d1a-4da7-422b-a88b-179c1847a7b2 (at 10.14.83.12@tcp) [23047.066047] Lustre: 9956:0:(client.c:2114:ptlrpc_expire_one_request()) @@@ Request sent has timed out for slow reply: [sent 1503182361/real 1503182361] req@ffff88006726cf00 x1576195361604704/t0(0) o13->testfs-OST0000-osc-MDT0000@10.14.83.12@tcp:7/4 lens 224/368 e 0 to 1 dl 1503182368 ref 1 fl Rpc:X/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1 [23047.074816] Lustre: testfs-OST0000-osc-MDT0000: Connection to testfs-OST0000 (at 10.14.83.12@tcp) was lost; in progress operations using this service will wait for recovery to complete [23049.016270] Lustre: MGS: Connection restored to f4d06d1a-4da7-422b-a88b-179c1847a7b2 (at 10.14.83.12@tcp) [23049.020208] Lustre: Skipped 1 previous similar message [23053.079918] Lustre: 9954:0:(client.c:2114:ptlrpc_expire_one_request()) @@@ Request sent has timed out for slow reply: [sent 1503182368/real 1503182368] req@ffff880005b86a00 x1576195361604720/t0(0) o8->testfs-OST0000-osc-MDT0000@10.14.83.12@tcp:28/4 lens 520/544 e 0 to 1 dl 1503182374 ref 1 fl Rpc:XN/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1 [23058.443321] Lustre: testfs-OST0000-osc-MDT0000: Connection restored to 10.14.83.12@tcp (at 10.14.83.12@tcp) [23058.447380] Lustre: Skipped 1 previous similar message [23072.080025] Lustre: testfs-MDT0000: Connection restored to 10.14.83.11@tcp (at 0@lo) [23594.178309] Lustre: testfs-MDT0000: Connection restored to f4d06d1a-4da7-422b-a88b-179c1847a7b2 (at 10.14.83.12@tcp) [23625.886099] Lustre: testfs-MDT0000: Connection restored to 10.14.83.11@tcp (at 0@lo) [23625.911277] Lustre: testfs-OST0001: Imperative Recovery enabled, recovery window shrunk from 300-900 down to 150-900 [23625.926058] LustreError: 14391:0:(osd_oi.c:503:osd_oid()) testfs-OST0001-osd: unsupported quota oid: 0x16 [23766.936439] Lustre: Failing over testfs-OST0001 [23766.945146] Lustre: server umount testfs-OST0001 complete [23769.191678] Lustre: testfs-MDT0000: Not available for connect from 10.14.83.12@tcp (stopping) [23769.581788] LustreError: 9956:0:(client.c:1166:ptlrpc_import_delay_req()) @@@ IMP_CLOSED req@ffff88006726c000 x1576195361609328/t0(0) o13->testfs-OST0000-osc-MDT0000@10.14.83.12@tcp:7/4 lens 224/368 e 0 to 0 dl 0 ref 1 fl Rpc:/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1 [23772.998699] Lustre: 15802:0:(client.c:2114:ptlrpc_expire_one_request()) @@@ Request sent has timed out for slow reply: [sent 1503183088/real 1503183088] req@ffff88006726de00 x1576195361609296/t0(0) o9->testfs-OST0001-osc-MDT0000@0@lo:28/4 lens 224/224 e 0 to 1 dl 1503183094 ref 2 fl Rpc:XN/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1 [23779.091656] Lustre: 15802:0:(client.c:2114:ptlrpc_expire_one_request()) @@@ Request sent has timed out for slow reply: [sent 1503183094/real 1503183094] req@ffff88000cb38c00 x1576195361609424/t0(0) o251->MGC10.14.83.11@tcp@0@lo:26/25 lens 224/224 e 0 to 1 dl 1503183100 ref 2 fl Rpc:XN/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1 [23779.178172] Lustre: server umount testfs-MDT0000 complete [23779.181542] Lustre: Skipped 1 previous similar message [23861.175060] VERIFY3(0 == rt->rt_space) failed (0 == 13824) [23861.179068] PANIC at range_tree.c:153:range_tree_destroy() [23861.182900] Showing stack for process 19561 [23861.186675] CPU: 1 PID: 19561 Comm: zpool Tainted: P OE ------------ 3.10.0-514.21.1.el7_lustre.x86_64 #1 [23861.190933] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011 [23861.194501] ffffffffa068f783 000000001e74d978 ffff88005ee87b40 ffffffff8168717f [23861.198197] ffff88005ee87b50 ffffffffa042d6f4 </pre> </div></div> <p>Relevant processes:</p> <div class="preformatted panel" style="border-width: 1px;"><div class="preformattedContent panelContent"> <pre>19561 ? Ds 0:00 | \_ zpool destroy zfs_pool_scsi0QEMU_QEMU_HARDDISK_disk3
</pre> </div></div>

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: We think we've addressed this by integrating with MMP, and removing all force imports / exports.
This looks like it's a duplicate of ZFS Issue 5953
